title: ProfilesPlayerStatistics
description:
Plugin addon of the ProfilsManagerCore plugin that allows to create several profiles for each player.
The addon allows to differentiate the inventory/life/position/inventory ... of each profile.
body: # ProfilsPlayerStatistics **ProfilsPlayerStatistics is an addon for the ProfilsManagerCore plugin.** This addon allows profiles to save vanilla player information per profiles. Should work for all version of Minecraft ! *inventory / life / EnderChest / experience / food ...* ***When you create a new profile, its position is put in the world spawn.*** **ProfilesManagerCore** : *https://modrinth.com/plugin/profilesmanagercore*
